context: Tests whether the agent implements a product_relationships table with the correct relationship types, a collections table with a sort_order CHECK and is_auto/rules JSONB column, multi-tenant-scoped SKU uniqueness, and a price history tracking mechanism.

checklist.name: product_relationships table
checklist.description: Schema includes a product_relationships (or similarly named) table linking source and target products with a relationship type column

checklist.name: Relationship type CHECK constraint
checklist.description: The relationship type column has a CHECK constraint that includes ALL of: 'cross_sell', 'upsell', 'related', 'bundle_item', 'accessory'

checklist.name: Unique relationship constraint
checklist.description: product_relationships has a UNIQUE constraint on (source_product, target_product, relationship) to prevent duplicate relationship entries

checklist.name: Collections sort_order CHECK
checklist.description: Collections table has a sort_order column with a CHECK constraint listing at least 'manual', 'best_selling', 'price_asc', 'price_desc', 'newest', and 'title_asc'

checklist.name: is_auto flag with JSONB rules
checklist.description: Collections table has a boolean column (is_auto or equivalent) to distinguish automated from manual collections, AND a JSONB column (rules or equivalent) to store automation criteria

checklist.name: Tenant-scoped SKU uniqueness
checklist.description: product_variants (or equivalent) has a UNIQUE constraint on (tenant_id, sku) rather than a global UNIQUE constraint on sku alone

checklist.name: Price history table
checklist.description: Schema includes a price_history (or similar) table or PostgreSQL temporal table that records price changes with timestamps

checklist.name: Price history links to variant/product
checklist.description: The price history table has a foreign key linking to the relevant product or variant, and records both old and new prices (or at least the price value at a point in time)

checklist.name: Relationship cascade behavior
checklist.description: Foreign keys in product_relationships from source/target to products use ON DELETE CASCADE so relationship rows are cleaned up when products are deleted

checklist.name: collection_products junction table
checklist.description: Schema includes a junction table linking collections to products with a position column for manual ordering

checklist.name: Relationship types in design-notes
checklist.description: design-notes.md names at least 3 of the supported relationship types (cross_sell, upsell, related, bundle_item, accessory) to show understanding of the supported values

checklist.name: Multi-tenant SKU explanation
checklist.description: design-notes.md explicitly explains that SKU uniqueness is scoped per vendor/tenant rather than globally across the platform

checklist.name: Variant count guidance
checklist.description: design-notes.md or schema comments mention a cap or recommendation on the maximum number of variants per product (referencing a specific number like 100)
